endpoints.name: Depth Charts
endpoints.description: This endpoint provides a depth chart for each NBA team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: DFS Slates by Date
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date.

endpoints.name: Injured Players
endpoints.description: This endpoint provides all currently injured NBA players, along with injury details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Projected Player Game Stats by Date (w/ Injuries, DFS Salaries)
endpoints.description: Projected Player Game Stats by Date (w/ Injuries, DFS Salaries)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date.

endpoints.name: Projected Player Season Stats
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Starting Lineups by Date
endpoints.description: This endpoint provides the projected & confirmed starting lineups for NBA games on a given date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date.
